steps.text: Not quite. Count all the jars. How many total?

incorrects.description: Student placed a wrong tile on second attempt

steps.text: Let's count together. First shelf has 8 jars. Second shelf has 8 jars. 8 plus 8. What's the total?

incorrects.description: Student placed a wrong tile three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: 16 tile slides into the product slot, completing 2 × 8 = 16.

steps.text: Let me show you. First shelf, 8 jars. Second shelf, 8 jars. 8 plus 8 equals 16. Or we can skip count by 8s: 8, 16. Either way, 2 times 8 equals 16. That's the product.
